message.content:
@startuml
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #E8E8F0
  BorderColor #666666
  FontColor #000000
}

rectangle "Alice" as Alice1
rectangle "Bob" as Bob1
rectangle "Alice" as Alice2
rectangle "Bob" as Bob2

Alice1 ..> Bob1 : Authentication Request
Bob1 ..> Alice2 : Authentication Response

note bottom of Alice1 and Bob1
  figure 1
end note

@enduml
